name: IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_VL
query: SELECT IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B.FILE_ID FILE_ID, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B.SETTING_NUMBER SETTING_NUMBER, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B.FILE_NUMBER FILE_NUMBER, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_TL.URL URL, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_TL.TYPE TYPE FROM IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B, IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_TL WHERE IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_B.FILE_ID = IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_TL.FILE_ID AND IRC_CX_CTM_FONTS_FILES_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
